src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
Remove unnecessary empty braces from the annotation definition to modernize code style.
Update Liquibase properties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old path causes a compile error.

Exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration from Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Rename logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Update logger field references from 'log' to 'LOG' throughout the class.
Add workaround to disable Spring Boot DevTools restart to prevent Hazelcast compatibility issues.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for SpringApplication instance.
Extract application name into a local variable for cleaner logging statement.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for hostAddress variable.
Reformat Optional chain for protocol determination to improve readability.
Reformat Optional chain for contextPath determination to improve readability.
Update logger reference in logApplicationStartup method from 'log' to 'LOG'.
Update logger reference in logApplicationStartup method from 'log' to 'LOG' for info message.
Use extracted applicationName variable in log message instead of calling env.getProperty directly.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat logger error call in production profile to use single-line method invocation style.
Replace explicit null check with String.valueOf for exception cause to handle potential nulls safely and concisely.
Use var keyword for local variable declaration to infer type from method return value.
Add a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to ApplicationProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); ... public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance from private final field to private static final field following standard Java logging conventions.
Update logger variable usage to match the new static final field name.
Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable type inference.
Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions compatible with JDK 21; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the current API.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Remove unused imports related to Git and Build properties and the custom key generator.
Replace wildcard Spring context imports with specific imports for Bean and Configuration.
Remove unused field declarations for Git and Build properties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename logger instance to follow static final naming convention.
Update logger usage to use the new static final LOG variable.
Remove unused setter methods for Git and Build properties.
Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean that depended on the removed properties.
Add H2 console configuration properties import and annotation to support Spring Boot 3.x H2 console auto-configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x changed H2 console configuration to use H2ConsoleProperties; without this, the console may not configure correctly or the build may fail if strict property binding is enforced.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add conditional property annotation to H2 TCP server bean to align with Spring Boot 3.x conditional configuration patterns.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x may require explicit conditional properties for H2 console/server beans to avoid conflicts or startup issues.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' and make it static final to follow Java logging best practices.
Update logger usage from 'log' to 'LOG' to match the renamed static final logger field.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: log.debug("H2 database is available on port {}", port);
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: LOG.debug("H2 database is available on port {}", port);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit 'int' type declaration with 'var' for local variable in getValidPortForH2 method.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable type inference.
Remove the Hibernate5JakartaModule bean definition and its import from the Jackson configuration.
Update Spring Boot import paths to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes DataSourceProperties, LiquibaseDataSource, and LiquibaseProperties have been moved to new packages (org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure and org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure) in Spring Boot 3.x; using old paths causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with Environment.matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Framework versions; env.matchesProfiles() is the required replacement to avoid compilation warnings or errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add support for configurable async Liquibase startup via application properties.
Convert list-based contexts and label filters to comma-delimited strings before setting on Liquibase.
Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException and com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper are no longer available or are deprecated in favor of the tools.jackson package in the updated dependency tree, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception type instead of the old one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method previously declared throwing JsonProcessingException which is no longer the correct type in the tools.jackson hierarchy; JacksonException is the new base exception type.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize the code style.
